action.reasoning: Observation: Logit adjustment with tau=1.2, mixup, and OneCycleLR improved balanced accuracy to 0.705. Few-shot accuracy improved significantly to 0.5639. Analysis: The model is learning well, but we can push regularization and training duration further to close the gap between many-shot and few-shot performance. CutMix is known to be very effective for CIFAR datasets. We will replace our custom mixup with timm's robust Mixup/CutMix implementation, add stochastic depth (drop_path_rate=0.1) to the ViT model, increase tau slightly to 1.3, and train for 40 epochs. Decision: Update train.py and predict.py to include these changes, train for 40 epochs, and evaluate.
